# GT2 — the paper §4.6 worked example (generated by `ladder_gate --fixture`)

`¬φ = F(a∧c) ∨ (GFb ∧ GF¬b)`, `K = FGb ∧ Gc`, `AP = {a,b,c}`.

## Machine census of I(¬φ) — the count §4.6's arithmetic must reproduce

| class | key | idem | loops | accepting loops |
|--:|---|---|---|---|
| 0 | `eps` | yes | [] | [] |
| 1 | `{}` | yes | [1] | [] |
| 2 | `{b}` | yes | [2] | [] |
| 3 | `{a,c}` | yes | [1, 2, 3, 4] | [1, 2, 3, 4] |
| 4 | `{}{b}` | yes | [1, 2, 4] | [4] |

5 classes, 9 linked pairs, accept = [(3, 1), (3, 2), (3, 3), (3, 4), (4, 4)].
